name: KAT7 CRISPR senescence and aged-mouse experiments
summary: Genome-wide CRISPR screening in progeroid human mesenchymal precursor cells plus in vivo Kat7 targeting in physiologically aged and progeroid mice.
model_system: Progeroid human mesenchymal precursor cells, physiologically aged mice, and Zmpste24-/- progeroid mice
